events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need produce JSON answer. Need interpret scenario: timing marks misaligned by a tooth on automotive powertrain timing. Work rough-complete. Condition installed-defective. Need estimate measurable condition and state why out of tolerance. Decision fail because dangerous/non-compliant. Risk high/critical? Misaligned timing by a tooth can cause engine damage, poor performance, valve/piston contact, catastrophic failure. Risk high or critical. In production floor, a tooth off is out of tolerance; OEM service info requires marks aligned exactly. Component conditions installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete maybe 70-80 rough-complete. Value maybe 1 tooth misalignment; but value numeric reading? Could represent misalignment in teeth: 1. Confidence high. Findings: timing marks misaligned by one tooth; cam/crank timing incorrect; potential valve-to-piston interference; engine performance/emissions non-compliance. Actions: remove/realign timing components per OEM service info, verify mark alignment, rotate engine by hand, re-inspect before closure. Rationale: OEM timing tolerances require exact alignment of marks; one tooth off exceeds allowable tolerance and can cause mechanical damage/non-compliance. References: OEM service info, maybe SAE/ISO quality gates. Need output only JSON. Ensure valid JSON.
